title: Festive German Snapper Baked
description: A unique and flavorful fish dish, featuring red snapper in a creamy Bhuna sauce, perfect for a festive occasion. This recipe is vegetarian-friendly, but feels indulgent and rich.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper, and season the snapper fillets with salt and pepper.
In a blender, combine the Bhuna sauce, sour cream, and chopped fresh parsley. Blend until smooth.
Transfer the sauce mixture to a saucepan, and heat over low heat until warmed through.
Arrange the snapper fillets on the prepared baking sheet, and spoon the Bhuna sauce over the top of each fillet.
Dot the top of each fillet with butter, and sprinkle with paprika.
Bake in the preheated oven for 12 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through and flakes easily with a fork.
Remove from the oven, and garnish with additional parsley if desired.
